description: Read a unified knowledge document by type-prefixed `.md` path. This tool returns plain-text document content in markdown form, not knowledge metadata or directory config.

path.description: The exact type-prefixed knowledge document path. Preserve every directory segment from `knowledge_list` results. Document paths must end with `.md`, for example `design/core-loop.md`, `skill/unity/import-pipeline.md`, or `skill/builtin/profiler.md`.

part.description: Which content section to read. `full` returns the markdown document body, `summary` returns the summary text only, and `body` returns the body text only.
